content:
INTELLIGENCE BRIEFING — Sun, 15 Feb 2026 04:46:07 GMT
Overall Threat Level: CRITICAL
Total Events: 242 | Critical: 77 | High: 26 | Medium: 22 | Low: 117

CRITICAL ALERTS:
  [MIDDLE EAST] US , Iran to Hold New Nuclear Talks in Geneva : Swiss Government Says (GDELT)
  [GLOBAL] Reported missing earlier , Indian boy found dead in San Francisco (GDELT)
  [AFRICA] Sudan Boat Capsizes : 12 Missing in White Nile , 21 Dead in Earlier Sinking (GDELT)
  [MIDDLE EAST] Israeli forces kill eight Palestinians in attacks across Gaza (Al Jazeera)
  [EUROPE] Germany Nuclear Red Line Must Hold – OpEd – Eurasia Review (GDELT)

REGIONAL ASSESSMENT:
  Middle East (53 events, 26 critical, 6 high):
    - US , Iran to Hold New Nuclear Talks in Geneva : Swiss Government Says
    - Israeli forces kill eight Palestinians in attacks across Gaza
    - US , Iran to restart nuclear talks in Geneva next week as Trump signals openness to meeting Khamenei
  Ukraine/Russia (14 events, 3 critical, 2 high):
    - The war dead pictured on banned Ukrainian athlete's helmet
    - Ukrainian slider's Olympics over as helmet appeal dismissed
    - How Russia’s Invasion is Impacting Ukraine’s Youth
  Europe (38 events, 14 critical, 2 high):
    - Germany Nuclear Red Line Must Hold – OpEd – Eurasia Review
    - Russia killed opposition leader Alexei Navalny using dart frog toxin, UK says
    - Two Britons among three dead in French Alps avalanche
  Indo-Pacific (41 events, 3 critical, 4 high):
    - North Korea draws new red line, vows attack over future airspace ‘violations’
    - Gilded Capability: Overinvestment and the Survivability Paradox
    - Russia’s Lavrov calls North Koreas nukes the key to its prosperity
  United States (6 events, 2 critical, 2 high):
    - US military used Anthropic’s AI model Claude in Venezuela raid, report says
    - Inside the Strike: The US Munition That Hit a Residential Building in Venezuela
    - Pentagon to deploy roughly 200 troops to Nigeria
  Global (65 events, 14 critical, 7 high):
    - Reported missing earlier , Indian boy found dead in San Francisco
    - Mark Carney joins hands with Canada opposition leader as he pays tribute to school shooting victims
    - FCAS may survive, but next-gen fighter negotiations all but dead: Industry source

Sources: GDELT, Al Jazeera, The Guardian, BBC World, Middle East Eye, BBC Europe, Breaking Defense, BBC Africa, Defense News, CISA Advisories, War on the Rocks, NK News, BBC Middle East, Bellingcat, BBC Latin America, NYT World, BBC Asia, The Diplomat
